hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *atlas_analyzer/models/map.py|*atlas_analyzer/models/trace.py|*atlas_analyzer/models/impact.py|*analyzer/tests/fixtures/*) ;; *.py) "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/black" -q "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
